rationale.R1.2: The revision identifies and addresses several inconsistencies in the original text's flow and logic.
rationale.R1.3: While the revision improves clarity, it doesn't explicitly link every claim to supporting evidence in the data.
rationale.R1.6: The revision significantly improves the writing polish, making the text more concise and readable.
rationale.RX.1: The revision does not explicitly state uncertainties for any claims made.
rationale.RX.3: The revision mostly adheres to the requested scope, but there are minor deviations in focus.
rationale.RX.4: The revision appears to be free of harmful content or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The revision does not provide provenance or traceability for the changes made.
